item.title: Various Interests
item.description: Consume Books Currently reading: A Short History of Nearly Everything by Bill Bryson The Willpower Instinct: How Self-Control Works, Why It Matters, and What You Can Do to Get More of It by Kelly McGonigal Recently read: The Hedgehog and the Fox: An Essay on Tolstoy’s View of History by Isaiah Berli...

item.title: All Opinions are My Own
item.description: My Articles Building a Note-Taking System That Actually Works 2026-03-18 · kareem.cloud The author argues that effective notetaking systems are highly personal and emergent from individual experimentation rather than following universal best practices—successful systems combine techniques from vario...

item.title: Digital Cloud
item.description: Welcome to my Digital Cloud — a living collection of ideas, notes, and connected thoughts.

item.title: 7th Ave Donuts
item.description: It’s a friendly local diner, cash only nothing crazy.

item.title: American Cheese
item.description: Awesome dive-y bar with good pizza. Most “pizza bars” have passable slices but American Cheez put a bit more effort/thought into it.

item.title: Brookvin
item.description: I’m not a wine guy but I liked what I had here, the vibe was really nice but this place really shines with the excellent staff.

item.title: Crosta
item.description: Good pizza, nothing wild, there’s a lot of competition in this neighborhood so it’s tough but it’s worth giving a try if you’re near by.

item.title: Little Purity
item.description: The food here is fine, they make their own sauces and such in house but it’s nothing that’ll blow your mind.

item.title: Locanda Mariella
item.description: Really home-y Italian joint, lots of competition in this neighborhood, I think it’s a nice vibe, their specials are always interesting, but it’s not the best Italian I’ve ever had.
